# freeipa_password_policy (Resource)

Manages FreeIPA Password Policies.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the policy (user group or 'global').

### Optional

- `failinterval` (Number) Failure interval in seconds.
- `history` (Number) Number of previous passwords to store.
- `lockouttime` (Number) Lockout duration in seconds.
- `maxfail` (Number) Maximum login failures before lockout.
- `maxlife` (Number) Maximum password lifetime in days.
- `minclasses` (Number) Minimum number of character classes.
- `minlength` (Number) Minimum password length.
- `minlife` (Number) Minimum password lifetime in hours.
- `priority` (Number) Priority of the policy.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique name of the password policy (group name or 'global').
